message:
fix(google-places,hackernews,calendly): C3.4 token constraints + related field type correctness

google-places: Unit test capability_token() missing constraints_cbor
caused CapabilityDenied in configure_and_invoke_health test. Added
CapabilityConstraints serialization with ciborium. Also fixed 4 related
fields using OP_* constants instead of CAP_READ.

hackernews: Fixed 7 related fields using operation IDs (OP_USER_GET,
OP_ITEM_GET, OP_NEW_STORIES, etc.) instead of capability ID (CAP_READ)
in CapabilityId slots.

calendly: Fixed 7 related fields using operation IDs (OP_EVENTS_GET,
OP_EVENTS_LIST, OP_SCHEDULING_LINKS_CREATE, etc.) instead of capability
IDs (CAP_EVENTS_READ, CAP_SCHEDULING_WRITE) in CapabilityId slots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -546,7 +546,7 @@ pub fn operations_info() -> Vec<OperationInfo> {
                     "Dates must be in ISO 8601 format".into(),
                 ],
                 examples: Vec::new(),
-                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(OP_EVENTS_GET)],
+                related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(CAP_EVENTS_READ)],
             },
             rate_limit: None,
             requires_approval: Some(ApprovalMode::None),
